title: BOLSIUS Foggy Green Rustic Shine Pillar Candle 13cm x 7cm
features: Bolsius Foggy Green Rustic Shine Pillar Candle 13Cm X 7Cm
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 13cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Dispose of candle and container responsibly.
